title: Manpage: remove slirp4netns/boltdb references
body:
For slirp4netns, one entire option was removed, plus two options no longer mention slirp as a valid setting.

For boltdb, one entire option was removed.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: My point was just to remove the user facing docs, code cleanup will need to happen later and since we dropped support in poidman/buildah the code here is  NOP that can be removed later without problems.
